mapper.select:
select sys_id , rule_cd , rule_nm , use_yn from sys_rule_master srm where 1=1
and ( rule_cd like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') or rule_nm like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )
mapper.insert: insert into sys_rule_master ( sys_id , rule_cd , rule_nm , use_yn , delete_yn , insert_user_id , insert_datetime, sys_plant_cd ) values ( #{ruleMaster.sysId}, #{ruleMaster.ruleCd}, #{ruleMaster.ruleNm}, #{ruleMaster.useYn}, 'N', #{userId}, now(), #{sysPlantCd} )
mapper.update: update sys_rule_master set rule_nm = #{ruleMaster.ruleNm}, use_yn = #{ruleMaster.useYn}, modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id = #{ruleMaster.sysId}
mapper.delete: update sys_rule_master set delete_yn = #{ruleMaster.deleteYn}, modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id = #{ruleMaster.sysId}
mapper.select: select count(*) > 0 from sys_rule_master where 1=1 and rule_cd = #{ruleMaster.ruleCd}
select sys_id , rule_cd , rule_nm , use_yn from sys_rule_master srm where 1=1 and sys_id = #{sysId}
select sys_id , rule_cd , rule_nm , use_yn from sys_rule_master srm where 1=1 and sys_id = #{sysId}
